meta.title: Sandboxx Address Cards (SAC's)
meta.description: Sandboxx Address Cards (SACs) are now standard issue at US Marine boot camp, San Diego and Parris Island. Sam explains how the SACs enable us to relay recruits addresses to family and friends so you can start writing letters as soon as possible.
